Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 37}Enemies afflicted with {f 0 1 2}Fear{f 0 1 27} will {f 0 1 2}attempt to flee if they see you{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 37}These enemies will {f 0 1 2}freeze in terror{f 0 1 27} when you make eye contact with them, but {f 0 1 2}attack you in a frenzied panic{f 0 1 27} if you turn your back. Beware.[n]{f 1 1}
